ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant chain */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the restaurant */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the restaurant */,
  "geolocation_service" TEXT /* Geolocation service provider (e.g., Google Maps, Apple Maps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location the employee works at */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location offering the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., main dishes, sides, drinks) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is currently available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location offering the promotion */,
  "promo_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotional offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the promotion's image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the feedback was given */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer for follow-up */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback was submitted anonymously */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location's inventory */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold at which a reorder is needed */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant location of the sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sold menu item */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale happened */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the loyalty program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loyalty program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty member */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty transaction */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty member */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant location */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the member */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the member */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_transactions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES loyalty_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_transactions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
